title: MCA: Middle Class Abbayi
subTitle: Nani, a middle-class boy with an eidetic memory, helps save his sister-in-law from a goon. Meanwhile, he also tries to convince his girlfriend's father to marry her off to him.

title: Krishna Aur Kans
subTitle: With his quick wit and valiant strength, Krishna outsmarts and defeats his evil uncle, King Kans, and the legion of demons he unleashes.

title: Om Shanti
subTitle: When a terror outfit plans to target Hyderabad with a series of bomb blasts, five individuals from different walks of life come together to save the people.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Bengaluru Underworld
subTitle: Maalik, who aspires to rule Bengaluru, becomes the right-hand man of the city's biggest gangster. Subsequently, he fights to reach the top using his quick wit and shrewdness.

title: Mere Yaar Ki Shaadi Hai
subTitle: Childhood friends Sanjay and Anjali do not realise their feelings for each other until Anjali gets engaged to Rohit. Sanjay arrives to help with the preparations, but has another plan up his sleeve.

title: Heropanti
subTitle: When Renu elopes with her lover, her father, Chowdhary, kidnaps Bablu and his friends, who know Renu's whereabouts. However, Bablu unintentionally falls for Dimpy, Chowdhary's younger daughter.

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: Dangal
subTitle: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestling champion, dedicates himself to transforming his daughters, Geeta and Babita, into elite wrestlers.

title: Housefull 3
subTitle: A rich businessman does not want his three daughters to get married because of a superstitious belief. Now, their boyfriends must prove to him that they are perfect for his daughters.

title: Kuberaa
subTitle: Following a tycoon's discovery of a rare oil reserve, a compassionate beggar gets trapped in the dangerous mechanisms of his rapacious scheme.

title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
subTitle: Mumbai-based couple Puneet and Munmun's lives are turned upside down when a distant relative arrives at their doorstep and starts meddling in their personal and professional affairs.

title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
subTitle: Mumbai-based couple Puneet and Munmun's lives are turned upside down when a distant relative arrives at their doorstep and starts meddling in their personal and professional affairs.

title: Panga
subTitle: Jaya, a former Kabaddi world champion, is pushed into making a comeback into the sport by her family. However, she first has to battle her internal conflicts and the expectations society has of her.

title: Andar Bahar
subTitle: Surya, a notorious criminal on the run, happens to meet the cheerful Suhasini, who is terminally ill. Taking pity on her, he decides to marry her and fulfil her lifelong wish.

title: Tera Mera Saath Rahen
subTitle: Raj is devoted to Rahul, his younger brother who has intellectual and physical disabilities. He falls for Madhuri but she insists that he institutionalise Rahul for them to be together.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Tanhaji: The Unsung Warrior
subTitle: Tanhaji, a Maratha warrior, is Shivaji Maharaj's trusted lieutenant. When the Mughals invade and conquer Kondhana fort, he sets out to reclaim it for his king and country.

title: Chhaava
subTitle: Following the death of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, his son, the Maratha king Sambhaji, takes a stand against the brutal Mughal emperor, Aurangzeb, in a bid to protect his empire.

title: Total Dhamaal
subTitle: In their desperate hunt for a hidden treasure, a group of oddballs must survive a series of cartoonish misadventures and hordes of quirky zoo animals.

title: Bhagam Bhag
subTitle: Champak and his theatre troupe travel to London for a show. However, their plans go awry when they accidentally become pawns in a murder and drug conspiracy.

title: Maa
subTitle: A married couple leads a happy life with their child until a hired hitman kills the wife. Soon, unable to bear the separation from her child, she returns as a spirit to look after her baby.

title: The Ghazi Attack
subTitle: In 1971, Ghazi, a submarine from Pakistan, tries to destroy the port at Vizag but, S21, an Indian submarine, poses as an obstacle.

title: The Ghazi Attack
subTitle: In 1971, Ghazi, a submarine from Pakistan, tries to destroy the port at Vizag but, S21, an Indian submarine, poses as an obstacle.

title: Sanju
subTitle: Bollywood actor Sanjay Sanju Dutt slogs through the quagmire of personal turmoil, substance abuse, and legal battles to find his way to dizzying heights of success.

title: Hyderabad Blues 2
subTitle: Six years after their marriage, a young couple witnesses a brand new threat that challenges their relationship's integrity and loyalty.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
